name: Strawberry Pound Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb butter (do not substitute with margarine)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs until foamy.
2. In a separate bowl, combine butter and sugar and beat until light and fluffy.
3. Blend in the beaten eggs and stir until thoroughly combined. Set aside.
4. Combine flour and baking powder. Sift together three times.
5. Gradually add the flour mixture alternately with the milk to the egg mixture, beginning and ending with flour. Mix until well combined.
6. Stir in vanilla.
7. Lightly oil and flour a 10-inch bundt pan. Pour in the cake batter.
8. Bake at 350 degrees F. for 45 to 50 minutes or until a tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Remove from oven and let stand for 5 minutes.
10. Remove from the pan and cool on a wire rack.
11. Spoon whipped cream sweetened with powdered sugar into the center of the ring.
12. Garnish with strawberry slices and orange rind, if desired.
Tips: This cake is also good just sprinkled with powdered sugar.
